name: Devil Hunters
short_description: A vampire survival game with 10 bosses with their own unique moves, a dozen heroes, runes, unlimited gems, and Sun Wukong!
detailed_description:
《Devil Hunters》——Chaos Descends, Hunters Assemble!

Welcome to "Devil Hunters," a randomized hellscape filled with endless possibilities! Here, every battle is a brand-new adventure, and every clash is filled with unknown surprises.

🎲 Endless Randomization, Never the Same!

Your enemies, your skills, even every numerical value in battle... all of them are randomized! You'll never experience two identical battles; only your wisdom and reflexes can carve a path through the chaos!

🏹 Double the Firepower with Two-Player Co-op!

Call on a friend for local two-player co-op, and face the demon legions together! With proper coordination, you'll be invincible demon hunters; with mistakes... well, just laugh as you watch each other get swarmed by monsters!

🔥 Five Levels, Ten Bosses, Each with Unique Styles!

The game features five distinct levels, each with unique environmental mechanics. And each level hides two ultimate bosses with completely different combat styles. Some are as ferocious as fire, others as elusive as shadows. Whether you can defeat them depends entirely on your skills!

⚡ Active Skills, Cataclysmic Power!

Not every battle can be solved with basic attacks. Thundering lightning strikes, earth-shattering meteors, ice-bound frozen wastelands... these powerful active skills let you dominate the battlefield!

💎 Elemental Counters, Strategic Victory!

Five elements—Physical, Ice, Lightning, Fire, and Poison—with Ice countering Lightning, Lightning countering Fire, and Fire countering Ice. Utilize level characteristics, hero synergies, runes, and gems to deal devastating damage!

🎭 11 Unique Heroes, Diverse Styles!

Each hero has a unique attack style. Some cleave through space with sword dances, others rain down destruction from afar, and some can even teleport for surprise attacks! Choose your main hero and become a legend in the demon-hunting world!

Chaos, passion, tactics, randomization... it's all in "Devil Hunters"!

Are you ready? The demons are lurking in the shadows. Grab your weapons and charge into battle!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Italian, Portuguese - Portugal, Ukrainian, Korean
